articles.title: A Sub-2-Hour Marathon Debut — and a Second-Place Finish That Made History
articles.summary: In his first-ever marathon, Yomif Kejelcha shattered the 2-hour barrier with a 1:59:41 in London — yet finished second. Sabastian Sawe won in a world-record 1:58:36, but Kejelcha called the result 'crazy' and 'very, very happy.'

articles.title: Musk Takes the Stand: 'If We Make It OK to Loot a Charity, Charitable Giving Will Be Destroyed'
articles.summary: Elon Musk testified Tuesday in his lawsuit against OpenAI, accusing its leaders of betraying the nonprofit's mission. OpenAI's lawyer countered that Musk wanted control and sued only after failing to become CEO. The trial could reshape AI governance.

articles.title: Senate Republicans Block Effort to End Trump's Cuba Energy Blockade
articles.summary: In a 51-47 vote, Senate Republicans rejected a War Powers resolution that would have forced President Trump to end the U.S. energy blockade on Cuba without congressional approval. Democrats argued the blockade is causing a humanitarian crisis.
